Publications

  • Patil, I., Makowski, D., Ben-Shachar, M. S., Wiernik, B., Bacher, E., Lüdecke, D. (2022), datawizard: An R Package for Easy Data Preparation and Statistical Transformations., Journal of Open Source Software, 7(78)

    • Paper: https://joss.theoj.org/papers/10.21105/joss.04684
    • Code: https://github.com/easystats/datawizard/

  • Bacher, E., Herrera-Rodriguez, M., Marino Fages, D., Stips, F. (2023), A replication of Jones & Marinescu (2022)

    • Paper: https://www.econstor.eu/handle/10419/278842
    • Code: https://osf.io/6atfw/overview

Work in progress

  • Do anti-immigration attitudes discourage immigration? Evidence from a new instrument, with Michel Beine and Hillel Rapoport, R&R at Journal of International Economics

  • Migrant Voices, with Martín Fernández
